name: Unbound3D Lynx 320 0.4 nozzle
machine_start_gcode:
; ======= Start G-code for Lab4Makers CoreXY with Euclid Probe =======
M190 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single]      ; Wait for bed temp
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]          ; 
G28                                               ; Home all axes (Euclid handles deploy/dock)
G1 Z5 F1800
SKEW_PROFILE LOAD=my_skew_profile
BED_MESH_PROFILE LOAD=default                     ; Load saved mesh profile (no adaptive mesh)

M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]          ; Wait for nozzle to reach print temp

G92 E0                                            ; Reset extruder
G1 Z2.0 F3000                                     ; Lift nozzle to safe height

; --- Purge / prime line ---
G1 X20.1 Y20 Z0.28 F5000.0                        ; Move to purge start position
G1 X20.1 Y250.0 Z0.28 F1500.0 E15                 ; Draw first purge line
G1 X20.4 Y250.0 Z0.28 F5000.0                     ; Small move sideways
G1 X20.4 Y20 Z0.28 F1500.0 E30                    ; Draw second purge line
G1 Z0.40 F1200                                    ; Slightly lift for thick line
G1 X22 Y20 F5000                                   ; Shift a bit away
G1 X22 Y250 Z0.35 F1500.0 E40                     ; Fat purge line
G92 E0                                            ; Reset extruder again
G1 E-1.0000 F1800                                 ; Retract slightly
G1 Z2.0 F3000                                     ; Lift nozzle
G1 E0.0000 F1800                                  ; Re-prime for printing
machine_end_gcode:
G91 ;Relative positionning
G1 E-5 F2700 ;Retract a bit
G1 E-5 Z0.2 F2400 ;Retract and raise Z
G1 X5 Y5 F3000 ;Wipe out
G1 Z10 ;Raise Z more
G90 ;Absolute positionning

G1 X310 Y300 ;Present print
M106 S0 ;Turn-off fan
M104 S0 ;Turn-off hotend
M140 S0 ;Turn-off bed
M84 X Y E ;Disable all steppers but Z
